concerns.text: Phase 0 (Research & Dataset Verification) from plan.md has no corresponding tasks. Plan Phase 0.1-0.5 (dataset verification, model weight verification, statistical methodology validation) are not represented in tasks.md. Implementer cannot execute required research gate before implementation.

FR-005 requires logging 'random seeds, model versions, AND environment details'. T024 covers seed/version logging but environment details logging is not explicitly addressed in task description. Missing coverage for full FR-005 requirement.

FR-014 requires Wilcoxon signed-rank test with effect sizes and 95% CI as PRIMARY outcome. T019 implements statistical tests but doesn't explicitly verify effect size calculation or primary outcome designation. Missing coverage for FR-014's specific effect size requirement.

FR-011 requires α ≤ 0.05 statistical significance threshold. T019 implements statistical tests but doesn't verify threshold is configurable and logged as required. Missing coverage for FR-011's threshold configurability.

Constitution III requires checksums recorded in state/projects/PROJ-573-https-arxiv-org-abs-2604-27351.yaml artifact_hashes map. T010 implements checksums in src/data/checksums.yaml - path mismatch violates Single Source of Truth. Missing coverage for Constitution III compliance.
